title: The Red Danube

actors: Walter Pidgeon, Ethel Barrymore, Peter Lawford
plot: Shortly after the end of World War II, British Colonel Michael S. "Hooky" Nicobar (Walter Pidgeon) is assigned to a unit in the British Zone of Vienna. His duty is to aid the Soviet authorities to repatriate citizens of the Soviet...
